sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, value) VALUES (1, 'abcde'), (2, 'fghij'), (3, NULL), (4, 'klmn'), (5, 'opqrst');
SELECT id, strchr((SELECT value FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1), 'c') AS char_index FROM test_strings WHERE value REGEXP '^a.*';
SELECT id, strchr(value, 0) AS char_index FROM test_strings WHERE value REGEXP '^abc|^klmn';
SELECT id, value, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings t2 WHERE strchr(t2.value, 'e') IS NOT NULL AND t2.id = test_strings.id) AS count_e FROM test_strings GROUP BY id, value HAVING count_e > 0;
SELECT id, value FROM test_strings WHERE strchr(value, 102) IS NULL AND value REGEXP '^(?!.*i).*';
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_counts AS SELECT id, COUNT(value) AS char_count FROM test_strings GROUP BY id;
SELECT t1.id, COUNT(t1.value) AS match_count FROM test_strings t1 JOIN temp_counts tc ON t1.id = tc.id WHERE strchr(t1.value, 't') IS NOT NULL GROUP BY t1.id ORDER BY match_count DESC;
SELECT id, value FROM test_strings WHERE value IS NULL AND REGEXP_REPLACE(value, 'a', 'z') IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO test_strings (id, value) VALUES (6, ''), (7, 'xyz'), (8, 'abc'), (9, NULL);
